name: sports_game_03

input.subject: Soccer Game This Saturday - Wildcats vs. Eagles
input.body_text:
Hi Wildcats Families!

Reminder about this Saturday's game:

⚽ GAME DETAILS ⚽

Wildcats vs. Eagles

Date: Saturday, February 21, 2026
Time: 10:00 AM (please arrive by 9:30)
Field: Sunnyvale Sports Complex, Field #3
       500 Athletic Way
       Sunnyvale, CA 94086

Players should wear:
- Green Wildcats jersey
- Black shorts
- Shin guards (required!)
- Cleats
- Water bottle

Please bring a folding chair - no bleachers at this field.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
SNACK DUTY
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The Martinez family is bringing snacks this week.
Thank you!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Let's go Wildcats! 🐱

Coach Davis
(408) 555-GOAL
